description: Triangle group for the apeirogonal {∞,3} tiling — one vertex is ideal

r1.description: Reflection across arc PQ (goes to ideal point)

relations: (r1·r3)^∞ = parabolic  [p-vertex is ideal, infinite order rotation]

idealVertex.description: The p-vertex is an ideal point on the boundary circle
idealVertex.effect: The 'rotation' at the ideal vertex is actually a parabolic Möbius transformation
idealVertex.parabolicTransformation: Fixes the ideal point, acts as a horocyclic translation
idealVertex.horocycles: The 'circles' of the ideal vertex are horocycles (internally tangent to boundary)

fundamentalDomain.note: Infinite area because P is an ideal vertex

parabolics.description: Contains parabolic elements (fixing one ideal point)
parabolics.conjugacyClass: All parabolics fixing the same ideal point are conjugate
parabolics.funnelEnd: The 'funnel' end of the hyperbolic surface leading to the cusp
